data.body: Derisk experiments EXECUTED for epic 3006-e198 (all offline, zero Jira writes, production artifacts): X1 inputs healthy (614/614 confirmed bindings; bindings-retired.json has never existed — corroborates class C); X2 drift census = EXACTLY the 7 known instances, zero unknown (A: REB-464/456/465/466/457 all To Do; B: REB-532; C: f8b5->REB-530; D: bridge-fsck reports clean over this store); X3 classifier spike: acting 7/615 = 1.14% (8.8x breaker headroom), acting set == known drift exactly, simulated heal reaches fixed point in one pass; X4 baselines 100% seedable from prev_snapshot (all 5 fields on all 613 bound+present keys). Epic ACs amended with: decision-census telemetry, baseline dual-write shadow, frozen-artifact census replay test. Emergent bug filed + linked discovered_from: rebar list --status=<invalid> silently returns [].
